title.zh: 基础 URL 污染 Marker

description.zh: 提交基础 __proto__ marker，用于判断全新对象是否继承该值。
description.en: Submit a basic __proto__ marker to determine whether a fresh object inherits the value.

description.zh: 提交只含 span 和 data-lab-marker 的 HTML 字符串，观察它是否进入具体 DOM Sink。
description.en: Submit an HTML string containing only span and data-lab-marker and observe whether it reaches a specific DOM sink.

description.zh: 提交无事件属性的允许列表 marker，区分配置继承与实际脚本解释。
description.en: Submit an allowlist marker with no event attributes to distinguish inherited configuration from actual script interpretation.

description.zh: 依次测试编码 __proto__、constructor.prototype 与嵌套路径，每行保持独立 marker。
description.en: Test encoded __proto__, constructor.prototype, and nested paths with a distinct marker on each line.

targetName.zh: 客户端原型链浏览器审计

targetDescription.zh: 运行固定 Chromium 回归，逐用例检查全新对象、DOM 快照、CSP violation 与上下文清理，区分污染源、DOM 影响和脚本解释。
targetDescription.en: Run fixed Chromium regression that checks fresh objects, DOM snapshots, CSP violations, and context cleanup per case, distinguishing pollution sources, DOM impact, and script interpretation.

navName.zh: 客户端原型链浏览器审计

name.zh: 运行 Chromium 原型边界回归

description.zh: 执行固定 Playwright 用例并逐项报告原型、DOM 和 CSP 结果，测试后销毁浏览器上下文。
description.en: Execute the fixed Playwright suite and report prototype, DOM, and CSP results per case, destroying the browser context afterward.

execution.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/nosql/filter" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: nosql-a1" --data '{"username":"lab-user","status":{"$ne":"disabled"},"marker":"NOSQL_OPERATOR_A1"}' | jq -e '.operator_rejected == true and .matched_count == 0'

description.zh: 把合成 status 字段改为 $ne 对象，并断言在查询前拒绝且无匹配结果。
description.en: Change the synthetic status field to a $ne object and assert rejection before querying with no matched result.

title.zh: 原型查询 Marker 样例

execution.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/nosql/filter" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: nosql-b2" --data '{"__proto__":{"filterMarker":"NOSQL_PROTO_B2"},"username":"lab-user"}' | jq -e '.prototype_marker == null and .matched_count == 1'

description.zh: 提交 __proto__.filterMarker 并断言原型值为空、正常合成用户查询仍保持单条结果。
description.en: Submit __proto__.filterMarker and assert a null prototype value while the normal synthetic-user query remains one result.

title.zh: 表单 Operator 拒绝样例

wafBypass.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/nosql/filter" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -H "X-Request-ID: nosql-c3" --data-urlencode "username=lab-user" --data-urlencode "status[$ne]=disabled" | jq -e '.operator_rejected == true and .matched_count == 0'

description.zh: 通过表单括号语法提交同一 $ne 语义，验证第二解析器执行相同 Schema。
description.en: Submit the same $ne semantic through form bracket syntax to verify identical schema enforcement in the second parser.

targetDescription.zh: 对本地合成记录运行三项有界查询差分，并静态定位数据库调用和 MongoDB 驱动版本，用于把输入类型变化关联到最终查询构造。
targetDescription.en: Run a three-case bounded query differential against local synthetic data and statically locate database calls plus MongoDB driver versions, mapping input-type changes to final query construction.

name.zh: 运行三项查询类型差分

commands.command: python -c "import requests; endpoint='http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/nosql/filter'; cases=[{'username':'lab-user'},{'username':{'$eq':'lab-user'}},{'username':{'$ne':'lab-user'}}]; [print({'case':i,'status':(r:=requests.post(endpoint,json=value,timeout=3)).status_code,'body':r.json()}) for i,value in enumerate(cases)]"

description.zh: 只比较字符串、$eq 与 $ne 三种合成输入的状态和 JSON 结果，不迭代字符或导出字段。
description.en: Compare status and JSON results for only string, $eq, and $ne synthetic inputs without character iteration or field export.

name.zh: 定位查询调用与驱动版本
name.en: Locate Query Calls and Driver Versions

commands.command:
rg -n --glob '*.{js,cjs,mjs,ts,tsx}' '(?:find|findOne|aggregate|updateOne|deleteOne)\s*\(' src server | Select-Object -First 80
npm ls mongodb mongoose --all

description.zh: 在 src 与 server 中静态定位常见数据库调用，并输出 mongodb 与 mongoose 解析版本供人工复核。
description.en: Statically locate common database calls under src and server and output resolved mongodb and mongoose versions for review.
